title: festuca longifolia subsp. pseudocostei
intro: Festuca longifolia subsp. pseudocostei, also known as False Coste's fescue, is a type of plant species in the grass family, Poaceae. This plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Festuca longifolia subsp. pseudocostei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Festuca longifolia subsp. pseudocostei can be used to prepare herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for its therapeutic benefits.
